title: Henry Phillips: Neither Here Nor There
original_title: Henry Phillips: Neither Here Nor There
overview: Join Henry Phillips as he performs his first ever Stand-Up Comedy Special at the Lyric Theatre in Los Angeles. This is a special evening that includes standup, music, and special guests, all tied together with Phillips' own unique brand of humor.
